name: Bhima Jewellers Group
description: Bhima Jewellers has a rich heritage of precious metal expertise, offering a wide choice of traditional jewellery, including a silver test product. Their collection is meticulously crafted by seasoned artisans, showcasing innovative designs that reflect their commitment to quality and creativity.

name: Nyrstar
description: Nyrstar is a prominent manufacturer of Silver Doré and other precious metals, highlighting its expertise in the sourcing and processing of silver. With a commitment to sustainability and operations across multiple continents, Nyrstar is well-positioned to serve various industries that require silver and other metals.

name: New Silver
description: New Silver is a non-bank lender that provides financing solutions for the fix and flip sector, focusing on single-family residential and small balance commercial assets. They utilize proprietary technology and data analytics to streamline loan originations and reduce default risk, also offering a tool called FlipScout to help investors identify high ROI real estate projects.

name: Silver Objects & Projects
description: Silver Objects & Projects is a retail company that offers a variety of unique and innovative products, creating an engaging shopping experience for customers.

name: Silver Emporium Private Limited
description: Silver Emporium is a prominent manufacturer and exporter of luxury handcrafted silverware and articles in India, specializing in a wide range of silver products that adhere to high-quality standards.

name: Mainly Silver Design Co. Ltd
description: Mainly Silver Design Co., Ltd. specializes in fine silver jewelry manufacturing and offers ethically produced products, including the option of using 100% recycled silver, reflecting their commitment to sustainability and responsible sourcing practices. With over twenty-five years of experience, they ensure high-quality merchandise that meets clients' needs for new collections and promotions.

name: Silver Point Finance
description: Silver Point Capital, L.P. is a prominent investment adviser specializing in credit and special situations investing, managing around $22 billion in assets. Their direct lending business, Silver Point Finance, offers tailored financing solutions, particularly for middle-market companies.

name: PALLION GROUP PTY LIMITED
description: Pallion is a key player in the Australian precious metals industry, involved in the design, manufacturing, and distribution of precious metal products. They have a strong presence with multiple entities and have achieved significant accreditations, positioning themselves as a trusted partner in the sector.

name: BODYSTEEL AND SILVER CO. LTD.
description: Bodysteel and Silver, a prominent manufacturer of premium body jewelry, specializes in unique designs crafted from high-quality materials, including Silver 92.5. Their commitment to innovative design and quality makes them a key player in the body jewelry market.

name: IGR Global
description: IGR GLOBAL is a professional service provider in the precious metals market, offering Silver Investment Bars. Their commitment to customer-centricity and constant innovation ensures they meet the needs of their clients effectively.
